source_pr.title: expression: fix incorrect proto fields and add missing overflow handling for arithmatic functions
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: H-ZeX <hzx20112012@gmail.com>

<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

expression: Fix some bug of cast that detected by https://github.com/tikv/copr-test/pull/4

### What is changed and how it works?

- There are some cast function that forget to handle the err using `ctx`, fix them by handle the err with `ctx`.
- This sql `select 1 / '2007'   div 1;` will fail with this err msg
 `For float(M,D), double(M,D) or decimal(M,D), M must be >= D (column '').`
 because in `arithmeticDivideFunctionClass.setType4DivReal`, it set the decimal to 31 while flen is 23. Then after `builtinCastRealAsDecimalSig.evalDecimal` is called , it will fail in `ProduceDecWithSpecifiedTp`
- change in `expression/builtin_arithmetic.go`: Without this change, the errMsg is like 
`BIGINT UNSIGNED value is out of range in '(Column#1 - Column#2)` , has no concrete number.
- change in `server/conn.go`: Many error (such as `errors.withStack`)'s `err` field is of `terror.Error` type, but themeself are not of `terror.Error` type. So origin code will hide the origin err code. Same in `store/mockstore/mocktikv/cop_handler_dag.go`'s `toPBError`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test
 - Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
   - test in https://github.com/tikv/copr-test/pull/3


Related changes

 - Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

Release note

 - Write release note for bug-fix or new feature.
TODO

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to instability introduced during test-infrastructure migration or refactoring (framework changes, fixtures/setup/teardown, or helper updates). Test-framework migrations can introduce subtle setup/teardown or helper mismatches that surface as flakiness. This PR stabilizes it by: expression: fix incorrect proto fields and add missing overflow handling for arithmatic functions.
fix_pattern: expression: fix incorrect proto fields and add missing overflow handling for arithmatic functions
